news.title:
Kaynes Technology India's credit rating reaffirmed by CRISIL as 'A Stable', removing 'Rating Watch with Developing Implications'.
Total bank loan facilities rated at Rs.770 crore across multiple banks including Canara, HDFC, ICICI, and SBI.
news.summary:
Kaynes Technology India's credit rating reaffirmed by CRISIL as 'A Stable', removing 'Rating Watch with Developing Implications'.
Total bank loan facilities rated at Rs.770 crore across multiple banks including Canara, HDFC, ICICI, and SBI.

news.title: Bluepearl MAP I LP sells 69,148 shares of Kaynes Technology at ₹3,614.4 avg price.
news.summary: Bluepearl MAP I LP sells 69,148 shares of Kaynes Technology at ₹3,614.4 avg price.

news.title:
Kaynes plans JVs with Chinese firms to comply with Indian regulations.
The company aims for better margins via supply chain improvements.
news.summary:
Kaynes plans JVs with Chinese firms to comply with Indian regulations.
The company aims for better margins via supply chain improvements.

news.title:
Kaynes Tech India's board approves Anuj Mehtha's resignation as CS, Compliance Officer effective March 10, 2026.
Ms. Sudhasri Addepalli appointed as new CS, Compliance Officer effective March 11, 2026; brings 27+ years of governance and finance expertise.
news.summary:
Kaynes Tech India's board approves Anuj Mehtha's resignation as CS, Compliance Officer effective March 10, 2026.
Ms. Sudhasri Addepalli appointed as new CS, Compliance Officer effective March 11, 2026; brings 27+ years of governance and finance expertise.

news.title:
Kaynes Tech partners with Mitsui & Co and Aoi Electronics to expand in India.
The collaboration emphasizes future technologies and innovation in the market.
news.summary:
Kaynes Tech partners with Mitsui & Co and Aoi Electronics to expand in India.

news.title: Kaynes Tech sees a major surge, hitting the day's high.
news.summary: Kaynes Tech sees a major surge, hitting the day's high.

news.title:
Kaynes Tech shares rose 4% after CLSA upgraded to 'Outperform' despite a target cut to ₹4,200.
Kaynes lowered FY26 revenue guidance to ₹4,100 crore; order book rose 12% sequentially to ₹9,072 crore.
news.summary:
Kaynes Tech shares rose 4% after CLSA upgraded to 'Outperform' despite a target cut to ₹4,200.
Kaynes lowered FY26 revenue guidance to ₹4,100 crore; order book rose 12% sequentially to ₹9,072 crore.

news.title:
Kaynes reports an 11% sequential revenue drop due to delayed railway orders.
The company revises its FY26 target following the revenue decline.
news.summary:
Kaynes reports an 11% sequential revenue drop due to delayed railway orders.
The company revises its FY26 target following the revenue decline.

news.title:
Kaynes Technology shared the audio recording of its Q3FY26 earnings call.
The recording is available on the company's website as per SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
Kaynes Technology shared the audio recording of its Q3FY26 earnings call.
The recording is available on the company's website as per SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
Kaynes Technology aims for $1B revenue by FY28, driven by growth.
Company reports robust 37% growth in 9M FY26 ahead of targets.
news.summary:
Kaynes Technology aims for $1B revenue by FY28, driven by growth.
Company reports robust 37% growth in 9M FY26 ahead of targets.

news.title: JPMorgan upgrades Kaynes Technology to overweight, sets target price at ₹6,100/share.
news.summary: JPMorgan upgrades Kaynes Technology to overweight, sets target price at ₹6,100/share.

news.title:
Kaynes Technology reduces FY26 revenue forecast to ₹4,100 crore.
The company maintains its margin guidance despite the revision.
news.summary:

news.title:
Kaynes Tech Q3 net profit rises to 766M INR YoY but misses 1.1B estimate.
Q3 revenue grew to 8B INR from 6.6B INR YoY.
news.summary:

news.title:
Dixon and Kaynes Tech shares drop over 4% due to Qualcomm's disappointing results.
Qualcomm cited memory chip shortages and rising costs; Dixon down 2.8% and Kaynes 4% ahead of results.
news.summary:
Dixon and Kaynes Tech shares drop over 4% due to Qualcomm's disappointing results.
Qualcomm cited memory chip shortages and rising costs; Dixon down 2.8% and Kaynes 4% ahead of results.

news.title:
Kaynes Technology executed an NSE block trade for ~49,181 shares at Rs. 3399.7.
The total value of the transaction was Rs. 16.72 crores.
news.summary:
Kaynes Technology executed an NSE block trade for ~49,181 shares at Rs. 3399.7.

news.title:
Budget 2026 boosts manufacturing with measures for electronics, pharma, textiles, and capital goods. ECMS outlay rises to ₹40,000 cr to reduce import reliance.
Amber Enterprises, Kaynes Tech stocks rise 2-5% on NSE; Dixon Tech dips 2%. ISM 2.0, tax exemptions, and MSME equity fund also announced.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 boosts manufacturing with measures for electronics, pharma, textiles, and capital goods. ECMS outlay rises to ₹40,000 cr to reduce import reliance.
Amber Enterprises, Kaynes Tech stocks rise 2-5% on NSE; Dixon Tech dips 2%. ISM 2.0, tax exemptions, and MSME equity fund also announced.

news.title:
Kaynes Tech, Dixon, CG Power shares rose up to 5% after Budget 2026 announcements.
Finance Minister announced ISM 2.0, increased electronics outlay to ₹40,000 crore to boost the sector.
news.summary:
Kaynes Tech, Dixon, CG Power shares rose up to 5% after Budget 2026 announcements.
Finance Minister announced ISM 2.0, increased electronics outlay to ₹40,000 crore to boost the sector.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed and upgraded Kaynes Technology's long-term fund-based cash credit to ICRA A Positive.
The positive outlook reflects enhanced credit profile and better operational performance.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed and upgraded Kaynes Technology's long-term fund-based cash credit to ICRA A Positive.
The positive outlook reflects enhanced credit profile and better operational performance.
